vendors.name: OpenAI
vendors.description: Creator of GPT models and ChatGPT. Enterprise API with data opt-out for API usage. Consumer products may use data for training.

vendors.name: Anthropic
vendors.description: Creator of Claude AI models. API data is not used for training. Strong focus on AI safety and constitutional AI.

vendors.name: Google Vertex AI
vendors.description: Google Cloud's ML platform with Gemini models. Data processing location configurable. Enterprise-grade security controls.

vendors.name: AWS Bedrock
vendors.description: AWS managed service for foundation models. Customer data is not used to train models. Multiple region availability including EU.

vendors.name: Hugging Face
vendors.description: Model hosting platform and community. Based in France (EU). Data handling varies by model - check individual model cards.

vendors.name: Mistral AI
vendors.description: European AI company based in France. Offers open-weight models. Strong EU data sovereignty positioning.

vendors.name: Cohere
vendors.description: Enterprise NLP and embeddings API. Based in Canada. Offers data opt-out for enterprise customers.

vendors.name: Stability AI
vendors.description: Creator of Stable Diffusion image generation models. Based in UK. Open-source focus with API offerings.

vendors.name: Midjourney
vendors.description: AI image generation service. User generations may be used for training per ToS. Consumer-focused, limited enterprise controls.

vendors.name: Jasper
vendors.description: AI content generation platform for marketing. Uses multiple underlying models. Enterprise tier offers data controls.
